 {"id":"bd-15n","title":"Update --continue flag to use SQLite index","description":"# Update --continue flag to use SQLite index

## Goal
Use SQLite index for fast lookup of most recent session when --continue is used.

## Current Implementation (src/main.rs)
Currently scans filesystem for most recent:
```rust
if args.continue_session {
    let session_dir = sessions_dir_for_cwd(&cwd);
    // Scans all files, sorts by mtime
    let most_recent = fs::read_dir(&session_dir)?
        .filter_map(|e| e.ok())
        .max_by_key(|e| e.metadata().ok()?.modified().ok()?);
    // ...
}
```

## New Implementation
```rust
if args.continue_session {
    let index = SessionIndex::open_default()?;
    let cwd = std::env::current_dir()?.to_string_lossy().to_string();
    
    if let Some(meta) = index.find_recent(&cwd)? {
        return load_session(&meta.path);
    }
    
    // Fallback to filesystem
    // ...
}
```

## Benefits
- O(1) lookup instead of O(n) filesystem scan
- Works across hundreds of sessions instantly
- Consistent with session picker behavior

## Dependencies
- bd-3nz (indexing must work first)

## Testing
- Test: --continue uses index
- Test: --continue falls back to filesystem
- Test: Performance improved

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] --continue queries index
- [ ] Fallback works if index empty
- [ ] Faster for users with many sessions","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-03T03:38:59.405457245Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-03T03:39:16.041645531Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-15n","depends_on_id":"bd-346","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-03T03:38:59.414630188Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-15n","depends_on_id":"bd-3nz","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-03T03:39:16.041620034Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"bd-17o","title":"RPC tests: replace MockProvider with VCR playback","description":"Goal:
- Remove MockProvider usage in tests/rpc_mode.rs and use VCR playback (real recorded streams) to validate RPC streaming behavior without mocks.

Scope:
- Replace MockProvider with a VCR-backed provider or adapter that replays recorded SSE chunks.
- Add cassette naming conventions for RPC scenarios (e.g., rpc_basic.json, rpc_toolcall.json).
- Validate real event sequences, stop reasons, and error propagation.
- Force VCR playback mode in tests (no network) and assert zero live HTTP calls.
- Emit detailed logs on each test: cassette path, expected events, actual events, and diffs.

Logging Requirements:
- Use TestLogger (bd-3ml) for per-test logs and auto-dump on failure.
- Log cassette path, parsed event timeline, and mismatch details (first divergent event + context).

Acceptance Criteria:
- tests/rpc_mode.rs contains no MockProvider/fake stream.
- All RPC tests run in playback mode with recorded cassettes.
- Logs include cassette name/path, parsed event timeline, and assertion diffs on failure.
- CI runs without network and still validates streaming edge cases.

Dependencies:
- Requires VCR infrastructure (bd-1pf).
- Requires recorded cassette(s) (bd-30u or RPC-specific capture).","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-03T04:58:22.325926811Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-03T05:43:14.356614967Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-17o","depends_on_id":"bd-1pf","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-03T04:59:49.570826261Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-17o","depends_on_id":"bd-26s","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-03T04:58:22.335029235Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-17o","depends_on_id":"bd-30u","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-03T04:59:55.584505356Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-17o","depends_on_id":"bd-3ml","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-03T05:43:14.356590291Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1d3","title":"Implement TUI snapshot testing infrastructure","description":"# Implement TUI snapshot testing infrastructure

## Goal
Create infrastructure for testing the interactive TUI by capturing terminal output
and comparing against golden snapshots, with detailed logging.

## Background
src/interactive.rs is 2842 lines with only 2 trivial tests (<0.1% coverage).
This is the most user-visible code and needs comprehensive testing.

## Approach: Snapshot Testing

### Why Snapshots?
- TUI output is complex (ANSI codes, layout)
- Pixel-perfect testing impractical
- Snapshots capture "expected output" simply
- Easy to update when intentional changes made

### Snapshot Format
```
// tests/snapshots/tui_initial_state.snap
┌─────────────────────────────────────┐
│ Pi - AI Coding Agent                │
├─────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                     │
│ > [cursor]                          │
│                                     │
├─────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Model: claude-sonnet-4   Tokens: 0  │
└─────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## Logging Requirements
- Use TestLogger (bd-3ml) for each snapshot test.
- Log view size, theme name, state flags, and snapshot name.
- On mismatch, dump the rendered view (ANSI-stripped) + diff context.

## Determinism Requirements
- Force terminal size (80x24) and disable time-based animations/spinners in test mode.
- Strip ANSI codes for snapshots.
- Use a fixed default theme and locale.

## Implementation

### Snapshot Library
Use insta crate for Rust snapshot testing:
```toml
[dev-dependencies]
insta = { version = "1", features = ["filters"] }
```

### Test Structure
```rust
// tests/tui_snapshot.rs

use insta::assert_snapshot;
use pi::interactive::PiApp;

#[test]
fn test_initial_state() {
    let app = PiApp::new(Config::default());
    let view = app.view();
    assert_snapshot!("initial_state", strip_ansi(&view));
}
```

### ANSI Code Handling
Strip ANSI codes for deterministic snapshots:
```rust
fn strip_ansi(s: &str) -> String {
    let re = regex::Regex::new(r"\x1b\[[0-9;]*[a-zA-Z]").unwrap();
    re.replace_all(s, "").to_string()
}
```

### Width/Height Normalization
Force consistent terminal size:
```rust
fn normalized_view(app: &PiApp) -> String {
    app.view_with_size(80, 24)
}
```

## Test Scenarios

### Layout Tests
1. Initial empty state
2. Single user message
3. Single assistant message
4. Conversation with multiple messages
5. Long message with wrapping
6. Scrolled viewport

### State Tests
7. Idle state
8. Streaming text
9. Streaming thinking
10. Tool execution in progress
11. Error display
12. Slash command help

### Input Tests
13. Text in input field
14. Multi-line input
15. History navigation
16. Cursor positioning

## Dependencies
None (can start independently)

## Files
- tests/tui_snapshot.rs
- tests/snapshots/*.snap (generated)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] insta crate integrated
- [ ] ANSI stripping works
- [ ] Terminal size normalized
- [ ] 15+ snapshot tests
- [ ] Logs include snapshot metadata
- [ ] cargo insta test works
- [ ] CI validates snapshots","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-03T03:35:28.554490342Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-03T08:42:46.796475700Z","closed_at":"2026-02-03T08:42:46.796412182Z","close_reason":"Added tui_snapshot tests + insta snapshots; suite green","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1d3","depends_on_id":"bd-26s","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-03T03:35:28.561095760Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1d3","depends_on_id":"bd-3ml","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-03T05:44:35.286107381Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":17,"issue_id":"bd-1d3","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Progress: added TUI snapshot test harness (tests/tui_snapshot.rs) using TestHarness + insta; added PiApp::set_terminal_size and PI_TEST_MODE init gating for animations; added dev-dep insta. Snapshots pending because cargo check/clippy failing due to removed reqwest/tokio deps still referenced in code; rustfmt still fails on import ordering in src/interactive.rs and provider tests.","created_at":"2026-02-03T06:19:49Z"}]}
